kernel_logic: Individual agency over digital presence. Explicit consent operates as a strict prerequisite for any data flow, utilizing minimal disclosure via selective release of attributes and contextual segmentation to prevent cross-service tracking.

decision_gates.then: Trigger explicit consent mechanisms with clear disclosure of the strict purpose.
Release a boolean predicate (e.g., Over 18) instead of the specific date of birth.
Deploy unique pairwise identifiers per service to prevent cross-tracking.
Encrypt or discard metadata unless essential for security or explicitly requested by the user.
